SEO.title: Report an issue
SEO.description: Tell us about a bug or anything else you ran into.

ReportHeader.title: Tell us what happened
ReportHeader.intro: Found a bug or something that didn't feel right? A few words is all we need — we read every report.

ReportPage.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Describe what you were doing and what went wrong. The more detail, the faster we can fix it.
ReportPage.fieldEmailDescription: Leave your email if you'd like us to follow up.

ContactRightContent.shareEnquiry: Share your enquiry and Teresa will reply as soon as she can — usually within 24 hours.
ContactRightContent.messagePlaceholder: Dates, venue, vibe, allergies — whatever helps Teresa prepare.
ContactRightContent.noSpam: No spam — just a thoughtful reply when she is back at her desk.

BookingsStatus.learnMoreAria: Learn what each booking status means

BookingStatusExplanation.seoDescription: A quick guide to what each booking status means — pending, confirmed, checked in, checked out and cancelled.
BookingStatusExplanation.title: Booking statuses, explained
BookingStatusExplanation.subtitle: Every booking moves through a few simple stages. Here's what each status means, so you always know where things stand.
BookingStatusExplanation.pendingDescription: The booking request has been sent and is waiting for the host to confirm. Nothing is charged until it's accepted.
BookingStatusExplanation.confirmedDescription: The host has accepted the booking. The dates are reserved and a confirmation email has been sent.
BookingStatusExplanation.checkedInDescription: The guest has arrived and the stay is currently in progress.
BookingStatusExplanation.checkedOutDescription: The stay is finished and the guest has checked out.
BookingStatusExplanation.cancelledDescription: The booking was called off — by the guest or host — and the dates have been released.
BookingStatusExplanation.declinedDescription: The host declined this request. The dates were never reserved and you can book another stay.
BookingStatusExplanation.autoDeclinedDescription: The host did not respond within 48 hours, so the request expired automatically. You can send a new request or choose another accommodation.
BookingStatusExplanation.cancelledNote: Guests can cancel a confirmed stay for free when check-in is at least 7 days away. Inside that window, contact the host directly.

BanUserDialog.title: Ban {email}
BanUserDialog.description: The user is signed out and cannot sign in again until unbanned. The optional reason is shown on next sign-in attempt.

ChangeRoleButton.demoteDescription: Are you sure you want to do this? The user will immediately lose admin privileges.
ChangeRoleButton.promoteDescription: Are you sure you want to do this? The user will gain full admin privileges, including the ability to ban and delete other accounts.

DeleteUserDialog.title: Delete {email}?
DeleteUserDialog.description: This is permanent and cascades to sessions and accounts. Type the email below to confirm.
DeleteUserDialog.adminDescription: Admins must be demoted to "user" before they can be deleted.

DeclineBookingDialog.title: Decline this reservation request?
DeclineBookingDialog.description: This declines {guest}'s request and emails them your reason. It can't be undone, so please explain your decision briefly and courteously.
DeclineBookingDialog.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. These dates are no longer available for booking.

CancelBookingDialog.title: Cancel this confirmed booking?
CancelBookingDialog.description: This cancels {guest}'s confirmed booking and notifies them by email. If they've already paid, the payment will be refunded. This can't be undone.
